update_logs: 1.2.7: Fixed runtime crash inside BDRM compositor initialization. Wrapped all graphics primitives and framebuffer parameters in compositor.cpp inside extern "C" blocks to align linkage with blankUI.cpp and kernel.cpp, preventing page faults from unresolved mangled symbols.

1.2.6: Final UEFI/crt0 hybrid ABI fix and BDRM Graphics Compositor activation. Declared efi_main as sysv_abi to match the precompiled Ubuntu crt0.o wrapper, while retaining ms_abi for standard UEFI function pointers. Restored crt0.o linkage to ensure proper PE/COFF header generation. Fully implemented the raw EFI Graphics Output Protocol (GOP) initialization and mapped the screen framebuffer to standard non-static structures. Created a complete 8x8 ASCII font table and shape rendering libraries inside blankUI.cpp and compositor.cpp, enabling frosted-glass glassmorphism window layers, macOS-style window controls, buttons, progress bars, sliders, and animated ASCII-art media rendering.

1.2.5: Bypassed standard gnu-efi crt0.o startup file entirely by defining a custom direct _start entry point with ms_abi. Added manual relocation with _relocate to fix the ABI mismatch and stack misalignment issues present on ubuntu-latest build environments.

1.2.4: Resolved catastrophic boot loop and hang. Removed the InitializeLib() call which caused an immediate crash due to Microsoft/System V ABI mismatch. Deleted the entire assembly kernel shim layer and transitioned fully to direct C++ linkage to let the compiler safely handle ABI translations automatically. Fixed missing extern C declarations in kernel.cpp and stubs.cpp.

1.2.3: Critical Architecture Overhaul. Fixed deep CPU ABI mismatch (RCX/RDI), C++ name mangling, and blankUI struct signature mismatches. Added Hybrid Dual-Boot (Legacy BIOS + UEFI) with custom MBR stub. Added VirtualBox and VMware auto-configuring templates.

1.2.0: Major Architectural Teardown. Rewrote the entire OS in native C++ and injected a pure Assembly Kernel Core. Added native Zero-Key Auth to App Store and hardware-accelerated ASCII video decoding to blankBrowser.
1.1.4: Completely overhauled linter.ps1 with advanced OS dev guards to catch ABI mismatches, Makefile omissions, and strict UEFI text encoding rules.
1.1.2: Re-architected boot sequence to unify the kernel into the UEFI bootloader, implemented mtools virtual floppy booting, and added a detailed visual text-mode OOBE installer.
1.1.1: Implemented automated GitHub Release publishing and the custom vibe-coded linter (linter.ps1).
1.1.0: Added Audio subsystem, Brightness controls, WiFi/BT toggles, blankDrop (AirDrop/QuickShare), and a Chrome-equivalent rendering engine in blankBrowser.
1.0.1: Added blankC dependencies, App Store, and System Info module.
1.0.0: Initial release featuring BDRM, blankUI, and .bloe support.
